description: This file defines Express.js route handlers for OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) related API endpoints, specifically for retrieving OEE summary and trend data. It imports middleware for authentication, as well as service functions to compute the data returned in responses.

methods.name: /summary route handler
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/summary', returning a KPI summary for a manufacturing line based on query parameters 'lineId' and optional 'windowMin'.

methods.name: /trends route handler
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/trends', returning trend data for a manufacturing line based on 'lineId' and optional 'minutes'.
